abilities.name: Soulstone Flare
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may drain a (soulstone) to add one suit of its choice to its Skl.

abilities.name: Unionized
abilities.text: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

abilities.name: "Watch Your Head!"
abilities.text: After this model suffers falling damage, all enemies in base contact suffer an equal amount of damage.

actions.name: Relic Hammer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may not be controlled by the enemy crew. If the target is a master, this action receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Maneuver
triggers.text: Another ally within LoS may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Philosophical Quandary
triggers.text: Once per activation. When resolving, the target may allow this model to remove a Strategy marker from anywhere on the board. If it does not, declare this action again.

actions.name: Wind Barrier
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Allies within (aura)3" of the made marker gain a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Crossbreeze
triggers.text: An enemy model within 3" of the made marker gains a Staggered token.
